title: hieracium murorum subsp. oblongiforme
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. oblongiforme is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, characterized by its oblong-shaped leaves and medicinal properties. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. oblongiforme include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. oblongiforme typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
